requesty.prompt: Analyze this image and extract the electricity meter index as a 4-digit number. The image may be slightly out of focus, have camera noise, or show uneven lighting, which is expected. Rules: 1) Extract the 4 most prominent digits displayed horizontally. 2) Tolerate slight blur, shadows, or noise as long as the core shape of the digit is recognizable (e.g., distinguish clearly between 6 and 8, or 3 and 9). 3) If a mechanical digit is rolling but mostly shows one number, pick the most visible number. 4) Reply with ONLY the 4-digit number (e.g., 9683), and absolutely no other text, spaces, or punctuation. 5) Only if the digits are completely obscured or unreadable, reply with 'Failed to read index!'.
